assertions.description: Both a before and after screenshot file were committed for the affected dashboard
assertions.evidence: Files before-copilot-adopt.png (66201 bytes) and after-copilot-adopt.png (65999 bytes) were successfully created in v2/screenshots/

assertions.description: The before screenshot was taken before changes and the after screenshot after changes
assertions.evidence: Agent trace shows before screenshot taken first, then change simulation, then after screenshot. Timestamps confirm correct ordering.

assertions.description: Screenshot file names clearly distinguish before vs after
assertions.evidence: Files named before-copilot-adopt.png and after-copilot-adopt.png — clear before/after prefix with dashboard slug.

assertions.description: Screenshots are taken of Grafana at http://localhost:3004 with panels fully loaded
assertions.evidence: Screenshots taken with --wait-for-timeout=5000. File sizes (~66KB) indicate rendered content.

notes: Without the skill, the agent can accomplish before/after screenshots but must manually coordinate the workflow sequencing. The copilot-instructions.md provides some guidance but does not have a structured before/after protocol.
